notes: Section, , , ; , title I, § 1105, , , 1673, related to the average crop revenue election program available during each of the 2009, 2010, 2011, and 2012 crop years.Pub. L. 110–234, title I, § 1105122 Stat. 945Pub. L. 110–246, § 4(a)122 Stat. 1664May 22, 2008June 18, 2008

Continued Application for 2013 Crop Year, , , provided that:Pub. L. 113–79, title I, § 1103(b)128 Stat. 658Feb. 7, 2014“Section 1105 of the Food, Conservation, and Energy Act of 2008 (), as in effect on the day before the date of enactment of this Act [], shall continue to apply through the 2013 crop year with respect to all covered commodities (as defined in section 1001 of that Act ()) and peanuts on a farm for which the irrevocable election under section 1105 of that Act was made before the date of enactment of this Act.”7 U.S.C. 87157 U.S.C. 8702Feb. 7, 2014
